title: Half of 8
description: Website for collective half of 8. Features an infinite grid for exploring chapters of the ‘Half of Journal’ zine, a music player, and even a narrative expedition of Mt. Fuji!

sample.text: Designer, In Japan. YouTube channel with reports, explorations, and interviews.
½ Book. A study of the development of my visual style. Sold out.
Awwwards NYC 2024. Exploring the Purpose of Artistic Expression in the Age of AI
Expedition to Mt. Fuji. An unusual report on an expedition to the one ♡ only.
Art Journal. An infinite exhibition of posters focused on relocation to Japan.
Sukima. An exhibition of clay and digital — exploring Japanese folklore.
SemiTone. Music tracks and visuals created in self-isolation during COVID-19.
Minimalist gym tracker. iOS app to log exercise data and see what to do next, no noise.
JetBrains Space. R&D project exploring a combination of team and coding tools.
Fleet Code Editor. A platform for lightweight coding solutions.
Matter. AI prototyping tool for product teams focused on real-world codebases.
